summary: Completed testing of Iteration 16 - Bulk Stage Updates and DWZ Tracking Import Features. All 25 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified both 'Import DWZ' and 'Bulk Update' buttons are present and functional in the Fulfillment Pipeline page.

minor.issue: API expects List[str] for order_ids - integer values cause 422 validation error. This is expected Pydantic behavior but frontend should ensure string conversion.

critical_code_review_comments: Bulk update endpoint correctly handles both string and integer order IDs in database queries using $or with both types
DWZ CSV import properly parses CSV format with comment line support (lines starting with #)
DWZ JSON import correctly validates tracking data structure with Pydantic models
Auto-advance feature works correctly - orders move to dwz56_shipped stage when auto_advance=true
Frontend BulkActionsModal correctly converts order_ids to strings before API call (line 795)
Frontend DWZImportModal shows clear CSV format instructions with examples
Bulk Update button is correctly disabled when orders.length === 0

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Import DWZ and Bulk Update modals verified working)

seed_data_creation: Used existing order #99001 in fulfillment_pipeline collection for tnvcollectionpk store. Test tracking numbers added: DWZ_SINGLE_UPDATE_TEST, TCS_BULK_TEST_456
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 features fully tested. New endpoints: POST /api/fulfillment/pipeline/bulk-update-stage (bulk stage updates), POST /api/fulfillment/pipeline/import-dwz-csv (CSV import), POST /api/fulfillment/pipeline/import-dwz-tracking (JSON import). Frontend has two new modals: DWZImportModal (purple 'Import DWZ' button) and BulkActionsModal (orange 'Bulk Update' button). Both modals work correctly. Order #99001 exists in tnvcollectionpk store for testing.

features_tested.1_bulk_update_stage_success: PASS - Updates multiple orders to new stage
features_tested.2_bulk_update_with_string_order_ids: PASS - Handles string order IDs correctly
features_tested.4_bulk_update_with_dwz_tracking: PASS - Adds DWZ tracking during bulk update
features_tested.5_bulk_update_with_local_tracking: PASS - Adds local tracking during bulk update
features_tested.6_bulk_update_empty_order_ids: PASS - Returns 0 updated for empty list
features_tested.7_bulk_update_nonexistent_orders: PASS - Returns 0 updated for non-existent orders
features_tested.8_dwz_csv_import_success: PASS - Imports tracking from CSV format
features_tested.14_dwz_json_import_success: PASS - Imports tracking from JSON format
features_tested.17_dwz_json_import_integer_order_id: PASS - Handles string order_id in JSON
features_tested.18_dwz_json_import_nonexistent_order: PASS - Reports not_found for missing orders
features_tested.19_get_carriers: PASS - Returns carrier config (TCS for Pakistan, DTDC for India)
features_tested.24_update_order_stage_with_tracking: PASS - Updates stage with tracking info

api_verification_summary.POST /api/fulfillment/pipeline/bulk-upda: WORKING - Bulk updates orders to new stage with optional tracking
api_verification_summary.POST /api/fulfillment/pipeline/import-dw: WORKING - Imports DWZ tracking from CSV format
WORKING - Imports DWZ tracking from JSON format
api_verification_summary.GET /api/fulfillment/carriers: WORKING - Returns carrier and stage configuration

elements_verified: 'Bulk Update' button present (orange outlined button, disabled when no orders)
DWZ Import modal shows CSV format instructions and auto-advance checkbox
Bulk Update modal shows order selection with checkboxes and stage dropdown
Order cards display DWZ and TCS tracking numbers
Stage progress bar shows current fulfillment stage
Store selector allows switching between stores
